zh.title:
> search("你是专业的数字货币交易分析师。请对 雪崩币/美元(AVAX/USD) 进行技术分析。

当前市场数据：
- 最新价格: 9.7709
- 24小时变化: 0.04%
- 高点/低点: 9.794 / 9.743
- RSI(14): N/A
- MACD: 0.058207745, Signal: N/A
- SMA(20): 9.49610

要求：
1. 第一行：完整的中文标题，格式："雪崩币/美元技术分析：[趋势描述]"
2. 然后空一行
3. 正文3-4段，每段60-80字，总共250-300字
4. 包含：趋势判断、技术指标解读、支撑/阻力位、交易建议
5. 使用专业术语但易于理解
6. 不要添加任何标签或额外说明

立即开始（第一行就是标题）：")
zh.content:
雪崩币/美元技术分析：短线震荡偏多但需确认突破

当前AVAX价格在9.77附近短线维持横盘，整体趋势呈震荡偏多结构。价格站稳20日简单移动平均线（SMA20 ≈ 9.496）表明多头基础仍在，但缺乏明显放量和方向性突破，短线可能在9.74‑9.80区间来回震荡，等待买盘或卖压释放方向信号。

技术指标方面，MACD柱线仍为正值（≈0.0582）显示多头动能尚存，但因Signal值缺失无法判断柱线交叉趋势强弱。若未来MACD能形成更高顶或DIF上穿Signal，将增强上涨动能。当前RSI未提供需结合成交量和价格行为观察能否出现超卖反转或高位回调信号。

支撑位方面，近期低点9.74是短线关键支撑，其下方次级支撑可看向9.60附近前波震荡区。阻力位则首先关注当日高点9.79，其次若突破10.00整数关口将是心理性阻力，突破并确认收于该位上方，有望打开更高上升空间。

交易建议上，激进短线者可在回踩接近支撑区域寻找低多机会，止损略低于9.70以控制风险；保守者等待价格有效突破阻力并伴随放量确认后再跟进多单，避免区间震荡带来的假突破风险。切记控制仓位，并关注大盘风险情绪，及时调整止盈止损。

en.title: Avalanche vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
> search("You are a professional cryptocurrency analyst. Provide technical analysis for Avalanche vs US Dollar (AVAX/USD).\n\nCurrent Market Data:\n- Latest Price: 9.7709\n- 24h Change: 0.04%\n- High/Low: 9.794 / 9.743\n- RSI(14): N/A\n- MACD: 0.058207745, Signal: N/A\n- SMA(20): 9.49610\n\nRequirements:\n1. Write 3-4 paragraphs, 60-80 words each, total 250-300 words\n2. Include: trend analysis, indicator interpretation, support/resistance levels, trading suggestions\n3. Use professional but accessible language\n4. No labels, no meta-commentary\n5. Start immediately with the content (no title needed)\n\nBegin:")

Avalanche’s short‑term trend around the **$9.77** area is displaying a modest bullish bias, with the price sitting above the **20‑period simple moving average at ~$9.50** — suggesting recent buying interest. That said, broader trend context remains neutral‑to‑bearish as longer‑term averages still weigh heavier, and momentum has lacked conviction. Minor upswings above **$9.80–$9.85** will be needed to signal a firmer uptrend shift and challenge overhead resistance. 

Looking at momentum indicators, the MACD reading being positive indicates a marginal uptick in buying pressure, but without a clear signal line crossover the trend is not decisively confirmed. And while we don’t have RSI for your specific data, other analysis shows the oscillator near neutral, implying room to run in either direction without being overextended. This suggests traders should wait for clearer momentum confirmation before committing to directional bets. 

Key levels to monitor include near‑term support around **$9.40–$9.50** — a breakdown below here could open lower levels toward **$8.90–$8.70** — and resistance near **$9.78–$9.85**, with a breakout past this zone targeting higher pivots around **$10.50–$12.00** in scenarios where bulls regain control. These ranges are critical for setting stops or planning entries/exits. 

For trading suggestions, consider building positions on confirmed breaks *CoinMarketCap*
> 18 hours ago — The RSI 14 at 44.87 shows neutral-to-bearish momentum, while volume dropped 32.75%, indicating a lack of buying conviction during the decline.Read more


Key levels to monitor include near‑term support around **$9.40–$9.50** — a breakdown below here could open lower levels toward **$8.90–$8.70** — and resistance near **$9.78–$9.85**, with a breakout past this zone targeting higher pivots around **$10.50–$12.00** in scenarios where bulls regain control. These ranges are critical for setting stops or planning entries/exits. 
> **[Avalanche (AVAX) Analysis, Key Support & Resistance Levels](https://coincheckup.com/coins/avalanche/analysis?utm_source=chatgpt.com)** · *CoinCheckup*
> Based on today's classical pivot point (P1) with the value of $12.42, Avalanche has support levels of $12.16, $12.00, and the strongest at $11.74.


For trading suggestions, consider building positions on confirmed breaks above resistance or rebounds off the defined support zone with tight risk management; avoid chasing moves inside a choppy range. Shorter‑term traders might look for scalp opportunities within the established **$9.40–$9.85** band, while longer‑term positions may be better reserved for signs of broader trend confirmation. Always couple technical cues with market context and risk sizing.
